# Kani proofs run on every pull request (fast subset, ≤15 min).
# One harness name per line. Blank lines and lines starting with `#` are ignored.
# The nightly/weekly full suite runs `cargo kani -p latticearc` without `--harness`,
# so proofs not listed here are still checked — just less often.
#
# Selection criteria for the PR subset:
#   - Enum-exhaustiveness proofs (policy engine, scheme selection).
#   - Type default/invariant proofs (SecurityLevel, ComplianceMode, PerformancePreference).
#   - Trust-level ordering / partial invariants.
# State-machine and biconditional proofs are heavier; they run in the nightly full suite.

security_level_default_is_high
compliance_mode_default_is_unrestricted
performance_preference_default_is_balanced
compliance_mode_requires_fips_exhaustive
compliance_mode_allows_hybrid_exhaustive
cnsa_requires_fips
cnsa_disallows_hybrid
trust_level_ordering_total
trust_level_untrusted_is_minimum
trust_level_is_trusted_iff_at_least_partial
force_scheme_covers_all_variants
select_pq_encryption_covers_all_levels
select_pq_signature_covers_all_levels
select_encryption_covers_all_levels
select_signature_covers_all_levels
